nterfaces: java.io.Serializable Direct Known Subclasses: GraphActionException , InvariantViolationException , MultipleEnabledTransitionsException public class IllegalActionException extends KernelException Thrown on an attempt to perform an action th

ption Thrown on an attempt to perform an action that would result in an inconsistent or contradictory data structure if it were allowed to complete. Examples include: An attempt to remove a port from an entity when the port does not belong to the

m an entity when the port does not belong to the entity. An attempt to add an item with no name to a named list. Since: Ptolemy II 0.2 Version: $Id: IllegalActionException.java,v 1.38 2005/07/08 19:59:16 cxh Exp $ Author: Edward A. Lee, Christopher
